summary: Tested Luna AI page color fixes and glassmorphism UI overhaul. All requested features verified: Luna icon is BLUE (not orange), AI avatar is BLUE, category cards are in 2-column grid and smaller, chat input/send button visible, AI tag badge is blue. Glassmorphism applied to Wallet mission cards, Profile stat cards, Profile settings container, and Auctions bid cards.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Luna AI page colors have been fixed from orange to blue. Glassmorphism has been applied to cards on Wallet, Profile, and Auctions pages. All UI changes verified working correctly.

mocked_apis.CherryHub: MOCKED - CherryHub membership API uses mock mode

details.ai_avatar_blue: PASS - AI avatar next to chat messages uses blue gradient
details.category_cards_2_column: PASS - What's Hot, VIP Access, My Rewards, Quick Info displayed in 2x2 grid
details.chat_input_visible: PASS - 'Ask Luna anything...' placeholder visible at bottom
details.send_button_visible: PASS - Arrow/send button visible on right side of input
details.ai_tag_badge_blue: PASS - AI badge uses colors.accentDim background with colors.accentGlow border

wallet_page_glassmorphism.details: Mission cards (Weekend Warrior, First Timer, Social Butterfly) use colors.glass background with colors.glassBorder border

details.stat_cards: PASS - Visits, Missions, Streak, Auctions Won cards use glassmorphism
details.settings_container: PASS - Settings section uses colors.glass background with colors.glassBorder border
